calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Feb-24-2014 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: 9:27am
Judge Pro Tem Steve Weber, clerk J. Kong, not reported, D525.
Cause called for Small Claism Appeal. Appellant, Ryan Gerrish, appears with counsel Pierre Basmaji and witness Ryan Cook; respondent,Steven Schmitt, appears in pro per with witness Loveila Digesti. Parties previously sworn, respectively present their cases in the narrative, and respond to questions from Judge Pro Tem Steve Weber.

9:30am
The matter is on recess and pass on to the next case.
10:18am: Matter is in session; all parties present. Appellant's counsel examined Ryan Gerrish. Counsel requests for continuce to review the respondent's newly exhibits and no ground, therefore,it is denied.

EXHA (1) Stipulation for entry of judgment/dismissal of action on UD case
EXHA (2) Copy of UD Complaint
EXHA (3) RESIDENTIAL lEASE /RENTAL AGREEMENT
EXHA (4) Endorsed Filed of Appellant's Trial Brief
EXHR (a) copy pictures damaged bushes front of the house/various pictures
EXHR (b) Rent agreement
EXHR (c) Property Inspection form
EXHR (d) Security Deposit Disposition
EXHR (e) Incident report of SF Fire Department
EXHR (f) 6 pages of home repair invoices
EXHR (g) stipulation for entry of judgment or dismissal of action
10:43am
court is on recess for appellant counsel to bring in the UD case claim for the Judge to review.
11:10am
Matter is in session;all parties present. Appellant's counsel examine respondent, Steven Schmitt and also re-examine his client, Ryan Gerrish.

11:27am
Matter is submitted. Newly evidence retained.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Dec-09-2013 Judgment Entered
